name: 酒店/宴會被攔截
description: 主角在高檔場所被保安或勢利小人攔住、驅趕，是製造屈辱感和階級壓迫的經典場景，為後續身份揭露的打臉做鋪墊。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: Security, take these people out. They're stinking up this place. / Do you think that you can become part of the upper echelon? by renting a decent suit and getting some luxury car. You know, you're really nothing more than a hobo.
examples.context: 主角在高檔場所被保安或勢利小人攔住、驅趕，是製造屈辱感和階級壓迫的經典場景，為後續身份揭露的打臉做鋪墊。
